about.heroSubtitle: Barnagar ki ek choti family kitchen se lekar laakhon dining tables tak — yeh Nidhi Masala ki journey hai, ek-ek parampara ko peeste hue.
about.beginTitle: Peedhi-dar-peedhi chali recipe, kabhi likhi nahi gayi
about.beginP1: Shuruaat ek simple vishwas se hui — ki Indian cooking ki aatma uske masalon mein basti hai. Jo family aur padosiyon ke liye haath se pise masalon se shuru hua, woh dheere-dheere poore region mein bharose ka naam ban gaya.
about.beginP2: Har season mein humne ek vada nibhaya: khet se kitchen tak asliyat, beech mein kuch bhi artificial nahi.

timeline.title: Ek vinamra shuruaat
timeline.text: Nidhi Grah Udyog ki shuruaat Barnagar ki ek choti family kitchen mein hui, jahan dadi-nani ki tarah haath se masale pise jaate the.

timeline.title: Jadein mazboot hui
timeline.text: Hamari khushbu ki charcha poore Ujjain mein fail gayi. Humne behtareen fasal ke liye seedhe local farmers se partnership ki.

timeline.title: Kitchen se industry tak
timeline.text: Humne apni processing ko modern banaya, saath hi un traditional recipes ki poori hifazat ki jo hamari pehchaan hain.

timeline.title: Laakhon kitchens mein
timeline.text: Das laakh se zyada families apne roz ke khane mein asli swaad ke liye Nidhi Masala par bharosa karte hain.

process.title: Khaton se chuna gaya
process.text: Bharosemand local farmers se seedhe haath se chuni fasal.

process.title: Dheemi aanch par bhuna
process.text: Tel aur khushbu ko banaye rakhne ke liye chote batches mein bhuna.

process.title: Patthar ki chakki par pisa
process.text: Natural swaad ke har sur ko bachane ke liye baareek pisa.

process.title: Taaza seal kiya
process.text: Airtight pack, taaki pehli chutki aakhri jaisi hi lage.

values.title: Quality sarvopari
values.description: Hum apne products ki quality se kabhi compromise nahi karte.

values.title: Customer kendrit
values.description: Aapki satisfaction hamesha hamari top priority hai.

values.title: Pyaar se bana
values.description: Har product ko care aur passion ke saath taiyar kiya jaata hai.

values.title: 100% Natural
values.description: Shudh ingredients, koi artificial milawat nahi.

about.ctaTitle: Apni kitchen ko hamari kahani mein jodein
about.ctaSubtitle: Un handcrafted masalon ko khojein jo usi tarah bane hain jaise hamesha banne chahiye the.

ourStory.label: Our Story
ourStory.heading: Authentic Indian Flavours
ourStory.body: Experience the rich heritage of traditional Indian spices, carefully sourced and blended to perfection. Each product tells a story of generations of expertise and passion for authentic flavours.

combo.defaultStorySavings: A ready-made kit of {{count}} kitchen essentials, bundled to save you ₹{{amount}} versus buying them one by one.

combo.saveTogether: Save more when you buy together

search.noResults: No products found matching your search
search.emptyBody: Shuru karne ke liye upar search bar mein koi masala, blend ya combo type karein.

areas.title: Shipping Areas
areas.body: Hum abhi India ke sabhi locations par shipping karte hain. Afsos, filhaal hum international shipping nahi karte.

charges.title: Shipping Charges
charges.intro: Shipping charge aapke order ke weight aur delivery location ke hisaab se calculate hota hai:
charges.upto: ₹499 tak ke orders: ₹69 shipping charge lagta hai

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.body: Aapka order ship hote hi aapko email aur SMS par tracking number milega. Is number se aap courier partner ki website par apna order track kar sakte hain, ya 'My Orders' page par uska status dekh sakte hain.

processing.title: Order Processing
processing.body: Payment confirm hone ke 24-48 ghante mein orders process kiye jaate hain. Weekend ya holidays par diye gaye orders agle business day process honge.

attempts.title: Delivery Attempts
attempts.body: Hamara courier partner 3 baar delivery ki koshish karega. Agar sabhi attempts fail ho jaate hain, to order humein wapas bhej diya jayega. Kripya sunishchit karein ki diye gaye address par order lene ke liye koi maujood ho.

address.title: Shipping Address
address.body1: Order dete waqt poora aur sahi shipping address dena customer ki zimmedari hai. Galat ya adhoore address ki wajah se khoye, delay hue ya wapas aaye orders ke liye hum zimmedar nahi hain, aur aise cases mein koi refund nahi diya jayega.
address.body2: Agar aapko apna address badalna hai, to order dene ke 1 ghante ke andar WhatsApp par +91 93000 05040 par humse contact karein. Is window ke baad address change ki guarantee nahi di ja sakti, kyunki order pehle hi dispatch ke liye process ho chuka ho sakta hai.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: Shipping se judi kisi bhi query ke liye, kripya hamare customer support +91 93000 05040 par contact karein ya hamare contact page se email karein.

eligibility.title: Return aur Replacement Eligibility
eligibility.intro: Hum sirf in kaaranon ke liye delivery ke 7 din ke andar return ya replacement request accept karte hain:
items: Mila hua product damaged ya defective hai
Galat product deliver hua
Product ki packaging se chhedchhaad hui hai ya tooti hui hai
Aapke order se kuch items missing hain

video.title: Unboxing Video Zaroori Hai
video.intro: Har return ya replacement request ke liye unboxing video zaroori hai. Iske bina, hum aapka claim accept nahi kar payenge.
items: Sealed package kholne se pehle shuru karte hue ek hi, continuous video record karein
Shipping label aur packaging ki condition saaf dikhni chahiye
Sabhi items nikaalte hue dikhayein, jismein damaged, galat ya missing item ki problem shaamil ho
Kate hue, edit kiye gaye ya package khulne ke baad shuru hone wale videos accept nahi kiye jayenge

nonReturnable.title: Return Na Hone Wale Items
nonReturnable.intro: Hygiene aur quality ke kaaranon se, ye return nahi kiye ja sakte:
items: Tooti seal ya khuli packaging wale products (jab tak wo aate hi damaged na hon)
Use kiye gaye ya khaaye gaye products
Mann badalna — food products deliver hone ke baad return nahi ho sakte

process.title: Return Process
items: Delivery ke 7 din ke andar hamare customer support se contact karein
Apna order number, return ka reason aur apna unboxing video dein
Hamari team 24-48 ghante mein aapki request verify karegi
Approve hone par, hum aapke address se pickup arrange karenge
Product original packaging mein hi wapas karna hoga

refund.title: Refund Process
refund.intro: Once we receive and inspect the returned product:
items: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days
For prepaid orders, the amount is credited back to the original payment method

For Cash on Delivery (COD) orders, there is no original payment method to credit — our team will call you to arrange the refund via UPI or bank transfer. All COD refund matters are resolved over the phone.
You will receive a confirmation once the refund is processed

replacement.title: Replacement Policy
replacement.body: Hum damaged ya defective items ke liye replacement dete hain, jo upar di gayi unboxing video ki shart ke adheen hai. Wapas aaya item milne ke baad replacement product bina kisi extra charge ke bheja jayega.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.body: You may cancel your order free of charge at any time before it has been shipped — just contact us and we will refund you in full. Once an order has been shipped, it can no longer be cancelled for a refund; you may still refuse delivery or use our returns process, but the shipping charge will not be refunded.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: Return ya refund se judi kisi bhi query ke liye, kripya hamare customer support +91 93000 05040 par contact karein ya hamare contact page se email karein. Hamari team Monday se Saturday, subah 9 baje se shaam 6 baje (IST) tak available hai.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Ye Terms & Conditions ("Terms") is website tak aapki pahunch, iske use aur <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> ("hum", "humein", "hamara") se products ki khareed ko control karti hain. Website browse karke, account banakar ya order dekar, aap in Terms se bandhe rehne ke liye sehmat hote hain. Agar aap sehmat nahi hain, to kripya website ka use na karein.

s1.title: 1. Eligibility
s1.body: Hamare yahan order dene ke liye aapki umra kam se kam 18 saal honi chahiye, ya aap parent ya legal guardian ki dekhrekh mein website use kar rahe hon, aur applicable Indian law ke tehat binding contract karne mein legally saksham hon.

s2.title: 2. Account & Registration
items: Registration aur checkout ke dauraan accurate, current aur poori information dena aapki zimmedari hai.
Apne login credentials ki confidentiality banaye rakhna aur apne account ke tehat sabhi activity ki zimmedari aapki hai.
Agar humein reasonable roop se lage ki kisi account ka use fraud se ya in Terms ke violation mein ho raha hai, to hum use suspend ya terminate kar sakte hain.

s3.title: 3. Products & Food Information
items: Hum masale, masala blends aur papad jaise packaged food products bechte hain. Product images sirf representation ke liye hain; actual colour, texture aur packaging thoda alag ho sakti hai.
Kripya consume karne se pehle physical packaging par label, ingredients, allergen information aur "best before" date padhein.

Agar aapko food allergies ya dietary restrictions hain, to apne vivek se hamare products consume karein. Jahan label ke instructions follow nahi kiye gaye, wahan hone wali reactions ke liye hum zimmedar nahi hain.

s4.title: 4. Pricing & Payment
items: Sabhi prices Indian Rupees (₹) mein listed hain aur jab tak anyatha na kaha jaye, applicable taxes ke saath hain. GST applicable rates ke hisaab se charge hota hai.
Shipping charges, jahan applicable hon, aapke order confirm karne se pehle checkout par dikhaye jaate hain.
Pricing error ki rare situation mein, hum order cancel karne aur pehle se pay ki gayi koi bhi amount refund karne ka adhikaar rakhte hain.
Payments checkout par dikhaye gaye methods se accept kiye jaate hain. Payment ki successful receipt verify hone ke baad hi aapka order confirm hota hai.

s5.title: 5. Orders & Acceptance
s5.body: Aapka order khareedne ka ek offer hai. Hum apne vivek se kisi bhi order ko accept ya decline karne ka adhikaar rakhte hain, jismein product out of stock hona, delivery address hamare serviceable area se bahar hona, ya fraud ka shak shaamil hai. Payment ke baad order decline hone par amount refund kar di jayegi.

s6.title: 6. Shipping, Returns & Cancellations
s6.body: Delivery timelines, shipping charges, returns, refunds aur cancellations hamari <shipping>Shipping Policy</shipping> aur <returns>Return & Refund Policy</returns> dwara control hote hain, jo in Terms ka hissa hain.

s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.body: Is website ka saara content — logos, brand names, text, graphics, images aur design sameit — <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> ya uske licensors ki property hai aur applicable intellectual property laws dwara protected hai. Hamari purv likhit permission ke bina aap ise copy, reproduce ya use nahi kar sakte.

s8.title: 8. Acceptable Use
s8.body: Aap sehmat hain ki website ka use kisi bhi unlawful purpose ke liye nahi karenge, hamare systems tak unauthorised access ki koshish nahi karenge, malicious code upload nahi karenge, bade paimane par data scrape nahi karenge, ya website ke normal operation mein interfere nahi karenge.

s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
s9.body: Law dwara permitted maximum limit tak, kisi order se paida hone wale kisi bhi claim ke liye hamari total liability us order ke liye aapke dwara pay ki gayi amount se zyada nahi hogi. Hum indirect ya consequential losses ke liye zimmedar nahi hain. In Terms mein kuch bhi Consumer Protection Act, 2019 ke tehat aapke rights ko limit nahi karta.

s10.title: 10. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
s10.body: Ye Terms India ke laws dwara governed hain. Koi bhi dispute Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh ki courts ke exclusive jurisdiction ke adheen hoga.

s11.title: 11. In Terms mein Badlaav
s11.body: Hum samay-samay par in Terms ko update kar sakte hain. Revised version updated "Last updated" date ke saath isi page par post kiya jayega. Badlaav ke baad website ka continuous use revised Terms ki acceptance maana jayega.

s12.title: 12. Contact Us
s12.body: In Terms ke baare mein kisi bhi sawaal ke liye, humse <phone>+91 93000 05040</phone> par ya hamare <contact>Contact page</contact> se contact karein.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ye Privacy Policy batati hai ki <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> (Proprietor: Lalit Kumar Jain) ("hum", "humein", "hamara") is website ke use ke dauraan aapke personal data ko kaise collect, use, share aur protect karta hai. Hum Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) aur applicable Indian law ke hisaab se aapka data handle karne ke liye committed hain. Website ka use karke, aap is Policy se sehmat hote hain.

s1.title: 1. Hum Kaunsa Data Collect Karte Hain
s1.item1: Account & order details: naam, email, phone number, shipping address aur order history.
s1.item2: Payment information: hum aapke poore payment credentials store nahi karte; UPI/payments payment provider dwara handle kiye jaate hain.
s1.item3: Usage & device data: dekhe gaye pages, browse kiye gaye products aur approximate (coarse) location, jo site aur recommendations behtar banane ke liye use hoti hai.

s2.title: 2. Purpose & Legal Basis
s2.body: Hum aapke personal data ko specified, lawful purposes ke liye process karte hain: aapke orders process aur deliver karne, customer support dene, recommendations personalise karne, anonymous aggregate analytics chalane, order updates bhejne aur (aapki consent se) promotional communication ke liye. Hum aapki consent par aur aapke dwara request ki gayi services poori karne ke liye zaroori processing par nirbhar karte hain.

s3.title: 3. Consent
s3.body: Aap humse contact karke kisi bhi samay apni consent wapas le sakte hain. Consent wapas lene se usse pehle ki gayi processing ki lawfulness par asar nahi hoga, aur isse kuch services dene ki hamari capability limit ho sakti hai.

s4.title: 4. Sharing of Data
s4.body: Hum aapka data sirf trusted service providers (courier/logistics partners, payment processors, hosting/analytics providers) ke saath, service operate karne ke liye zaroori had tak hi share karte hain. Hum aapka personal data nahi bechte. Law dwara zaroori hone par hum data disclose kar sakte hain.

s5.title: 5. Cookies & Analytics
s5.body: Hum aapko logged in rakhne, aapki cart yaad rakhne aur anonymous, aggregate analytics ke through website ka use samajhne ke liye cookies aur similar technologies use karte hain. Aap apni browser settings aur on-site cookie notice ke through cookies control kar sakte hain.

s6.title: 6. Data Security & Retention
s6.body: Hum aapke data ki protection ke liye reasonable technical aur organisational safeguards use karte hain. Hum personal data sirf utni der tak retain karte hain jitna hamari services dene aur legal, accounting aur tax obligations poori karne ke liye zaroori ho.

s7.title: 7. Aapke Rights (DPDP Act, 2023)
s7.body: Aapko apna personal data access, correct, update aur erase karne, nominate karne aur grievance redressal ka adhikaar hai. Kisi bhi right ka use karne ke liye, neeche diye details se humse contact karein.

s8.title: 8. Grievance Officer
s8.body:
Ankur Jain • +91 93000 05040
Hum 48 ghante mein grievances acknowledge karte hain aur 30 din mein unhe resolve karne ka lakshya rakhte hain.

s9.title: 9. Contact Us
s9.body: <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand>, 7, Industrial Area, Runija Road, Barnagar, Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh 456771. Email <email>nidhigrahudyog@rediffmail.com</email> ya call <phone>+91 93000 05040</phone>, ya hamare <contact>Contact page</contact> ka use karein.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Ordering, delivery aur returns ke baare mein wo sab kuch jo aapko jaanna chahiye.
faq.still: Abhi bhi koi sawaal hai? Hamari team se contact karein.

items.q: Aap kin areas mein delivery karte hain?
items.a: Hum abhi poore India mein sabhi locations par shipping karte hain. Filhaal hum international shipping nahi dete.

items.q: Delivery mein kitna time lagta hai?
items.a: Payment confirmation ke 24–48 ghante mein orders process kiye jaate hain. Delivery mein aam taur par metro cities mein 3–5 business days, doosre sheheron mein 5–7 din aur door-daraaz areas mein 7–10 din lagte hain.
₹499 se upar ke orders par shipping free hai. ₹499 se kam ke orders ke liye nominal shipping charge lagta hai, jo payment se pehle checkout par dikhaya jaata hai.

items.q: Main apna order kaise track karun?
items.a: Aapka order ship hote hi aapko email/SMS par tracking number milega. Aap 'My Orders' ke andar kisi bhi samay order status bhi dekh sakte hain.

items.q: Main apna bill / invoice kaise download karun?
items.a: 'My Orders' par jaayein, relevant order kholein aur GST tax invoice ko PDF ke roop mein download karne ke liye 'Bill' par click karein.

items.q: Aap kaunse payment methods accept karte hain?
items.a: Hum UPI payments accept karte hain. Accepted methods checkout par dikhaye jaate hain. Payment ki successful receipt verify hone par aapka order confirm ho jaata hai.

items.q: Kya main apna order cancel kar sakta hoon?
items.a: Haan. Order dene ke 24 ghante ke andar unhe free of charge cancel kiya ja sakta hai, bashart ki wo abhi tak ship na hue hon. Details ke liye hamari Return & Refund Policy dekhein.

items.q: Aapki return aur refund policy kya hai?
items.a: Damaged, defective, galat ya missing items ke liye hum delivery ke 7 din ke andar returns accept karte hain. Approved refunds 5–7 business days mein aapke original payment method mein process kiye jaate hain. Hygiene ke kaaranon se, khule ya khaaye gaye food products return nahi kiye ja sakte, jab tak wo damaged na pahunche hon.

items.q: Kya aapke products fresh hain aur main unhe kaise store karun?
items.a: Haan — hamare masale aur papad fresh pack kiye jaate hain. Kripya packaging par 'best before' date check karein aur seedhi dhoop aur nami se door, thandi aur sookhi jagah par store karein.

items.q: Main customer support se kaise contact karun?
items.a: Aap humein +91 93000 05040 par (Monday–Saturday, subah 9–shaam 6 IST) ya hamare Contact page se contact kar sakte hain. Aap website par assistant ke through humse chat bhi kar sakte hain.

errorBoundary.title: Humari taraf se kuch gadbad ho gayi
errorBoundary.message: Is page ko load karte waqt ek technical issue aa gaya. Isme aapki koi galti nahi hai. Please page reload karein — aur agar problem baar-baar aaye to humse contact karein, hum ise theek kar denge.
errorBoundary.contactTitle: Ab bhi dikkat hai? Humse contact karein
errorBoundary.contactHint: Neeche diya gaya reference bataayein, taaki hum pata laga sakein ki kya hua.
